examples: Mewing and running, they caused a frightful confusion.
In that frightful moment, I think his fierce heart broke.
I have been terribly disappointed, for this child has brought the most frightful animals into the house.
You should definitely check those lists out for some great flicks to fill your frightful nights all month long.
While the innate quality of the European students was very high, for the most part their study habits were frightful.
